default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly Director Standup to discuss LLM experiments, tracking, and client updates](https://fathom.video/share/wgjVRMtyDs1PpTxR-H6-MiqQMGYghsWD?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implementing more rigorous tracking for content refreshes and their impact on LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/wgjVRMtyDs1PpTxR-H6-MiqQMGYghsWD?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Exploring LLMS.txt file implementation and tracking for multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/wgjVRMtyDs1PpTxR-H6-MiqQMGYghsWD?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Planning new experiments around TLDR/FAQ placement and content refresh strategies](https://fathom.video/share/wgjVRMtyDs1PpTxR-H6-MiqQMGYghsWD?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Need to clarify Scrunch's prompt tracking methodology and optimize its use for experiments](https://fathom.video/share/wgjVRMtyDs1PpTxR-H6-MiqQMGYghsWD?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Tracking
